app.name: MRT QuickPass
app.tagline: Buy tickets ahead, plan your route, skip the queue

demo.banner: Demo Mode — data is stored on this device only
demo.qrTicket: This QR Ticket is for demonstration only and cannot be used at real MRT gates.
demo.queue: Queue data is simulated for the prototype
demo.notReal: This app is not connected to the real MRT ticketing, gate, or payment systems of MRTA/BEM.
demo.realtimeFallback: Real-time connection failed. Using simulated data.

home.prompt: Where would you like to go today?
home.noLocation: Location not granted — showing popular stations instead

location.title: Your location
location.denied: Location access is unavailable. Please allow location access in your browser.
location.unsupported: This browser does not support location services.
location.enabled: Location enabled. Nearby stations will now update in real time.
location.readError: Unable to read your location. Please try again.
location.permissionHint: Location permission is requested only after you press Enable location.
location.enableDescription: Enable location to find nearby MRT stations in real time.

privacy.title: Privacy and data policy
privacy.description: This prototype stores account data on this device and may use your location to find nearby stations.

slides.title: Search and plan your trip
slides.description: Enter a station or place and the app will suggest the fastest MRT route.

slides.title: Top up your wallet
slides.description: Add demo funds once and use them to pay fares without entering details again.

slides.title: Real-time location
slides.description: See your nearest station and live prototype crowd information.

slides.title: Use a QR demo ticket
slides.description: Choose your origin and destination, pay first, then use a separate rotating QR demo ticket for each passenger.

search.title: Find destination
search.empty: No results. Try a different query.

map.title: MRT Map
map.baseMapIncomplete: Base map did not load completely
map.tileLoadError: The map background could not load, but MRT lines are still available. Check your connection or tile provider.
map.renderErrorTitle: MRT map could not be displayed
map.renderErrorDescription: The map encountered an error, but the rest of the app remains available. Check that your browser supports WebGL and reload the page.

route.title: Route
route.operatorNote: Fare may be paid separately by operator

ticket.emptyDesc: Plan a trip and create your Demo QR Ticket here.
ticket.demoScanHint: Use Scan in and Scan out to demonstrate the journey status flow. Location is not required.

family.title: Group / Family Ticket
family.totalNote: Each passenger receives a separate QR Ticket.
family.warning: Each passenger must scan through the gate separately.

faqs.a1: In demo mode, make sure the code hasn't expired and press Simulate Scan In from the Ticket page.
faqs.q2: How to use an expired ticket?
faqs.a2: Expired tickets cannot be scanned in. Please buy a new one.
faqs.a3: If not yet scanned in, you can cancel and buy again (demo mode).
faqs.q4: Can this open real MRT gates?
faqs.a4: Not yet. This is a Demo QR Ticket that will go live once the app is authorized to integrate with MRTA/BEM.

admin.title: Admin Demo Dashboard
admin.warning: This page is Demo-only — changes update the Queue page instantly.

auth.privacyAndTerms: privacy policy and terms of use

errors.emailPasswordRequired: Please enter your email and password.
errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.policyRequired: Please accept the privacy policy and terms of use.
errors.registerFailed: Unable to create the account. This email may already be in use.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to keep your wallet and tickets with your account.
login.demoDisclaimer: Accounts are stored on this device for demonstration only.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Create an account to use the wallet and track your trips.
register.demoDisclaimer: Data is stored on this device only (Demo mode).

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: Reset the password for a demo account stored on this device.
forgot.demoDisclaimer: This feature resets demo accounts stored on this device only. It does not send a real password-reset email.

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Top up in advance for faster fare payment.
wallet.loginDescription: Sign in before topping up or using the wallet.
wallet.demoDisclaimer: Demo top-ups do not charge real money.

errors.maximum: The maximum top-up is ฿50,000 per transaction.

guide.title: How to use MRT QuickPass
guide.subtitle: Get familiar with MRT QuickPass in a few minutes.

1.title: 1. Create an account / Sign in
1.description: Create an account to save your wallet, trip history, and tickets.

2.title: 2. Top up your wallet
2.description: Add demo credit in advance so you can pay fares without entering payment details each time.

3.title: 3. Search and plan a route
3.description: Search by station or place to see a recommended MRT route and fare.

4.title: 4. Use real-time location
4.description: The Home page shows your nearest station to make choosing an origin easier.

5.title: 5. Check crowd levels
5.description: Each station shows demo crowd levels and estimated waiting times.

6.title: 6. Pay with the wallet
6.description: Choose e-Wallet at checkout to deduct the fare from your demo balance.

7.title: 7. Receive a QR demo ticket
7.description: After payment, each passenger receives a separate rotating QR demo ticket and ticket reference.

8.title: 8. Demonstrate Scan in and Scan out
8.description: Use the demo buttons to move the ticket from Ready to use, to In journey, and then Completed.

policy.title: Privacy policy
policy.subtitle: How MRT QuickPass stores data, uses location, and operates as a prototype.
policy.demoTitle: This website is a Demo / Prototype
policy.demoDescription: MRT QuickPass is not connected to real MRTA/BEM gates, ticketing, payment systems, or official databases. All information is provided only to test the user experience and design.
policy.disclaimer: Travel, map, and station information in this prototype may be incomplete or differ from real-time conditions.

1.title: Data stored
1.body: MRT QuickPass is a prototype. Demo account, ticket, wallet, and preference data is stored only on the user's device through localStorage.

2.title: Real-time location
2.body: Your location is used only to estimate the nearest MRT station. Location tracking starts after you approve it and depends on browser permission.

3.title: Demo account storage
3.body: Accounts and passwords are demo data stored on this device, not real MRTA/BEM accounts. Do not use a password from another service.

4.title: Transit data limitations
4.body: Station, route, fare, queue, and location data may not be official or truly real time. Check the operator's official information before travelling.

5.title: Terms of use
5.body: This app demonstrates a concept and user experience only. Do not use its tickets or information for real travel or payment.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.desc: The link you opened may be invalid or has moved.
